textByHash.b62fb4495932d7af9762348d6865a0a7a44a8de4: Beware, adventurer. You are brave, but braver folk than you have fallen in pursuit of the sacred water.
textByHash.6f18b6ccbeaa67bd27ee5d4ee5b19d2bebb92569: Perilous dangers do await thee, Tojalon, Senay and Devere make three. None hold malice but will test your might, pray you do not lose these fights.
textByHash.341b4918c4e87a5bc37761909b7105e86d1748a7: If, however, you win this day, take heart that see the spring you may.
textByHash.8573a25be5673aa478ac8e4da28afb314df50e29: Through Dragon's eye will you gain new heart. Heed these words, else swiftly depart.
textByHash.d368baff955e50151227847379006b175067ea48: Adventurer, I am already deceased, and therefore impervious to your attacks. Still, I can tell when I'm not wanted...
textByHash.6f9009373cc7a5084a93661b124be43a0ee2dcce: So, you have fallen for the foul one's trick...
